prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PLASTICDROPPERS-100PACK Product Type: PIPET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: (100 Pack) ASR Outdoor Plastic Dropper Pipette Gold Panning 5.5 Inch - 3mL Description: Make precision easy while doing your gold panning projects with the ASR Outdoor Plastic Dropper Pipette 100 Pack.

These droppers are about 5.5" in length and have a capacity of 3mL, the perfect size for absorb gold, liquid or particles that you're working with. Simply hold the pipette, squeeze and release the top bulb end to absorb your materials.

In addition to prospecting, you can also use these pipettes for testing in laboratories, microbiology, chemistry, e-liquids, fragrances and precision crafting projects. The pipettes are constructed of polyethylene and are reusable. Make sure to grab a set of these before your next gold panning adventure or precision project. Search Terms: controlled dispensing pipette pipet pipettor chemical dropper laboratory instrument transfer water university lab tool scientific instrument gold panning droppers fine gold flake collection sample vial equipment minelab Features: - Industrial Science Lab Pipette Dropper - Clear with graduation markers - Capacity: 3mL | Length: 5.5" - Pack Size: 100 - Easily Draw & Dispense Gold, Liquids or Particles - Material: Polyethylene (Non-toxic) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100-Pack 5.5 Inch Gold Panning Plastic Droppers

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100-Pk 5.5 In Clear 3mL Plastic Dropper Pipette

anthropic.title_differentiation: 3ML Capacity, Lab Grade Pipette, Gold Panning And Precision Crafting, Reusable Polyethylene

openai.title_differentiation: 3ML Capacity, Clear Graduation Markers, Polyethylene Reusable Build, Precision Gold Panning And Lab Use
